positive: A whimsical, highly detailed watercolor illustration of a forest clearing at dawn. Include glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate ferns, and a gentle stream reflecting pastel colors. Studio Ghibli aesthetic, soft focus, ethereal lighting, botanical illustration style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, oversaturated
